[[File:NabooCruiserAquatic.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Naboo Cruiser (top row); Heavy Naboo Cruiser (bottom row)]]
'''Naboo Cruisers''' were aquatic [[Navy/Legends|naval]] vessels used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. They featured a cannon and could be upgraded with heavier armor and a second cannon. The upgraded vessels were known as [[Cruiser (Naboo)|Heavy Naboo Cruisers]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
These vessels appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2003]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are only buildable by playing the Naboo civilization in multiplayer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
